attributes.title: Stream lock guide
attributes.visState:
{"title": "Stream lock guide", "type": "markdown", "aggs": [], "params": {"fontSize": 14, "openLinksInNewTab": true, "markdown": "### Stream locks (`cpm-routing-config`)

Pin a data stream to a cluster. Document ID = topic name, e.g. `logs-account-gateway-prd`.

Required fields: `config_type: stream_lock`, `cluster_id`, `locked: true`, `pipeline_type` (`catchall` or `dedicated`), plus `data_stream_type`, `dataset`, `namespace`.

After create/update/delete, run **cpm-state-manager** then **cpm-pipeline-manager**.

Example:

    PUT cpm-routing-config/_doc/logs-account-gateway-prd
    {
      "config_type": "stream_lock",
      "data_stream_type": "logs",
      "dataset": "account-gateway",
      "namespace": "prd",
      "cluster_id": "<from CPM clusters table>",
      "pipeline_type": "dedicated",
      "locked": true,
      "reason": "Force hot stream to remote-a"
    }

Remove a lock: `DELETE cpm-routing-config/_doc/logs-account-gateway-prd` then re-run the watchers.
"}}
